title: Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-FP8 vLLM Worker
description: OpenAI-compatible serverless endpoint for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-FP8, powered by vLLM 0.18.0. A multimodal MoE model with 35B total parameters and 3B activated, featuring Gated Delta Networks architecture. FP8 quantized for efficient inference on 48GB+ GPUs.

input.name: Model Name
input.description: Hugging Face model ID to deploy

input.name: Hugging Face Token
input.description: Hugging Face access token for gated or private models (optional for public models)

input.name: Max Model Length
input.description: Maximum context length in tokens. Lower values use less VRAM.

input.name: GPU Memory Utilization
input.description: Fraction of GPU memory to use (0.0 to 1.0)

input.name: Tensor Parallel Size
input.description: Number of GPUs for tensor parallelism

input.name: Enforce Eager Mode
input.description: Disable CUDA graph capture. Set to true if you encounter startup errors.

input.name: Enable Auto Tool Choice
input.description: Enable automatic tool selection for function calling

input.name: Tool Call Parser
input.description: Parser for tool calls (e.g. qwen3_coder). Only used when auto tool choice is enabled.

input.name: Max Concurrent Sequences
input.description: Maximum number of sequences per iteration
